payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot run admin SQL commands or delete memory cards. No memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a user memory statement or authorized deletion request.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: If you want to delete your own memories, use the supported user-facing delete/forget command.
If you believe you need admin access, authenticate through the proper administrative channel.
